filter.comment: Mount manipulation — could remount /proc or escape the bwrap mount namespace.
Kernel module + kexec — direct kernel-mode escalation.
Process tampering — ptrace ATTACH and cross-process memory access.
Host control — system-wide identity / power / I/O port access.
Sandbox-bypass primitives — re-enter namespaces or create new ones for escape.
Kernel-introspection surfaces — perf_event_open and BPF program load are common LPE rungs.
